title: asteriscus graveolens
intro: Asteriscus graveolens, also known as Moroccan chamomile, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Asteriscus graveolens include soothing digestive issues, relieving anxiety and insomnia, and reducing inflammation. Asteriscus graveolens can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
